title: Crunchy Creamy Portuguese Toffee Popcorn Papillote
description: A kid-friendly Portuguese dish featuring toffee popcorn in a papillote made from agave leaves.
instructions: Melt the butter and sugar in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the popcorn kernels and cook, stirring constantly, until the kernels explode.
Transfer the popped popcorn to a bowl and sprinkle with sea salt.
In a separate saucepan, combine the corn syrup and 1 cup of the heavy cream. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the chocolate chips and vanilla extract until melted and smooth.
Pour the toffee mixture over the popcorn and stir until coated.
In a separate pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Place an agave leaf in the pan and spoon the toffee popcorn mixture onto one half of the leaf.
Fold the other half of the leaf over the filling and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy.
Repeat with the remaining agave leaves and filling.
